---
title: "Conflict training in high-risk occupations: Recommendations and pilot evaluation for conflict resolution with public safety and military professionals"
author:
  - name: Thomas J. Hodges
    orcid: 0000-0002-5184-7346
    affiliation: AMES Research Center, Peacebuilding and Development, Kennesaw State University
  - name: Charles Bowen
    affiliation: Department of Criminal Justice, University of North Georgia
  - name: Brian A. Moore
    orcid: 0000-0003-0273-7236
    affiliation: AMES Research Center, Kennesaw State University
type: "Working Paper"
categories:
  - Health
  - Conflict Resolution
toc: false
---

## Links

## Abstract

## Citation

**Hodges, T. J.,** Brown, C. & Moore, B.A. (Under Review). “Conflict Training in High-Risk Occupations: Recommendations and Evaluation for Conflict Resolution with Public Safety and Military Professionals.” Target Journal: *Peace & Conflict*.
